mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cb_ords_probe_audit ( audit_id, event_type, key_id, object_id, status, row_count, error_code, message, created_at ) VALUES ( cb_ords_probe_audit_seq.NEXTVAL, #{eventType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{keyId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{objectId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rowCount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{errorCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{message,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
